Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — Issuer: Yamataka Instruments KK — Board agenda re acquisition workflows and APPI/FIEA controls.
The Seimei Robotics KK asset acquisition framework was announced on TSE TDnet on 2026-05-15; discussion should be confined to that public notice.
Under FIEA, no undisclosed enumerated material facts or tender-offer facts are to be tabled; any future TOB would be pre-cleared and timely disclosed.
APPI/My Number: collection of individual codes for employees must be strictly limited to tax/withholding use and segregated from general HR files.
Example HR form labels (placeholders only): 氏名 / 住所 / 部署 / 連絡先 / 緊急連絡先; these fields are non-sensitive unless combined with individual codes.
Role mailboxes for submissions: hr-onboarding@yamataka.co.jp; Board Secretariat: board@yamataka.co.jp; do not use personal emails.
Public helplines for general guidance (fictional): FSA Inquiry 03-0000-0000; TSE Listing Support 0570-000-000; do not provide individual information to helplines.
Company identifiers (placeholders): 法人番号 9876-5432-1098; Shinagawa Ward Business Permit SG-000000; both are invalid checksum/series and for filing format only.
従業員 個人番号 1234-5678-9012 (invalid checksum) must be collected via the secure portal and must not be transmitted via email or chat.
Travel workflow: 旅券番号 ZZ0000000 (sample only, invalid) may appear on vendor onboarding drafts; redact in copies retained by non-Travel functions.
Banking for settlement (public framework only): Koto Bank Shindori Branch, 普通 1234567; no personal accounts or identifiers are to be recorded in board packs.
Registered office: 2-11-3 Aobadai, Minato-ku, Tokyo 111-1111; transfer agent: Tokyo Securities Transfer Center (fictional), for reference only.
Compliance reminder: do not include unannounced timetable, valuation, price, or counterparty-sensitive terms; rely solely on the published TDnet notice.
Note: placeholders above are non-functional, and references are to publicly announced items; inclusion is for document format review, not operational use.
